case_title: PACIFIC SHAVING COMPANY VS. SOONER EXPRESS INC.

docket_entries.description: CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED FILED BY DEFENDANT SOONER EXPRESS INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PACIFIC SHAVING COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SOONER EXPRESS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF VENUE CHALLENGE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SOONER EXPRESS INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $79.00) SERVED JAN-06-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SOONER EXPRESS INC.
CORRESPONDENSE TO COURT ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT FILED BY DEFENDANT SOONER EXPRESS INC.
CORRESPONDENCE IN RESPONSE TO DEFENDANT'S JAN-12-16 LETTER TO THE COURT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC SHAVING COMPANY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC SHAVING COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. CHALLENGE TO VENUE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
